---
title: "Bird Abundance"
author: Alex Gonzales, Ethan Castelazo, Zelda Reif
source: editor
format: 
  pdf:
    include-in-header: 
       text: |
         \usepackage{fvextra}
         \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{Highlighting}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
         \DefineVerbatimEnvironment{OutputCode}{Verbatim}{breaklines,commandchars=\\\{\}}
---

# Set up
## Packages

```{r}
#| label: packages

# general use
library(tidyverse)
library(here)
library(janitor)
library(snakecase)

#Wrap Axis Label
library(scales)

#reading .xlsx files
library(readxl)

# visualize missing data
library(naniar)

# visualizing
library(patchwork)
```

## Data 
```{r}
#| label: data
birds <- read_csv(here("data", "birds.csv"))

water <- read_csv(here("data", "venoco-water.csv"))

```

## counting birds
```{r}

number_of_species <- birds %>% 
  mutate(n_species = n_distinct(species)) %>% 
  mutate(n_groups = n_distinct(e_bird_group))

```
